title: Option for customizing Dice-So-Nice die for Shadowrun 5.0
description:
A simple module to disable the forced SR5 custom die (ds) in Dice-So-Nice so that the dot versions can be used.
	It is also possible to customize the dot versions by replacing the dot.webp image in /modules/dice-so-nice/textures folder with one's own design.
	A sample image is available. This module does not do anything if Dice-So-Nice module is not installed and in use.
